allow: Bash(for file in pl.ts tr.ts cz.ts ru.ts uk.ts da.ts fa.ts gr.ts zh.ts)

Bash(for key in manageCalendarsSmartCompletionTooltip manageCalendarsColumnHeaderValues manageCalendarsPromoteTooltip manageCalendarsRemoveAssignmentTooltip manageCalendarsImplicitColumnTooltip manageCalendarsCardinalityWarningTooltip)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
R4: Refactor monolithic scene into component architecture

Refactored scene-manage-calendars.ts from 1,365 lines to 620 lines by
extracting functionality into focused components following the ManageDates
pattern established in the codebase.

Components created:
- scene-manage-calendars-header.ts \(135 lines\): Header controls, buttons,
  legend
- scene-manage-calendars-grid.ts \(535 lines\): Tabulator grid with all cell
  formatting, icons, and interactions

Main scene now focuses on:
- State management \(tableInfo, sortState, activeSuggestions\)
- Component orchestration
- API calls \(CRUD operations\)
- Event delegation to components

Benefits:
- Clear separation of concerns \(UI vs orchestration\)
- Components follow ManageDates lifecycle pattern \(render, update, destroy\)
- Easier to maintain and test individual components
- Follows established Bravo architectural patterns

Helper modules \(calendar-mappings.ts, calendar-suggestions.ts\) were
previously committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
